_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Conduct risk analysis, feasibility study, and/or trade-off analysis to develop, document, and refine functional requirements and specifications.
reference_document_element_description: Conduct DPIAs for new or materially changed data processing activities, documenting risks, mitigations, and residual risk acceptance decisions.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI SP domain. SP-T-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-T-012 (RC, cosine: 0.559), AB-T-009 (AB, cosine: 0.545).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.2/10 (raw 0.617). Shared vocabulary: [conduct, risk]. DCWF-only terms [analysis, develop, document, feasibility, functional, off] vs WIDAI-only terms [acceptance, activities, changed, data, decisions, documenting] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.866 (P=0.870, R=0.862). Balanced P/R — the 17-word DCWF element and 18-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Conduct risk analysis, feasibility study, and/or trade-off analysis to develop," and "Conduct DPIAs for new or materially changed data processing activities, document" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.564 < STS 0.617 (gap -0.054). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [analysis, develop, document] and [acceptance, activities, changed] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 13.3%. Shared tokens: [conduct, risk]. DCWF-only: [analysis, develop, document, feasibility, functional, off]. WIDAI-only: [acceptance, activities, changed, data, decisions, documenting].
